title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SAN ROQUE BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL IN TANAUAN, LEYTE, TO TANAUAN HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 21677 / 88 OG No. 26, 4107 (June 29, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7466, April 28, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SAN ROQUE BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL IN TANAUAN, LEYTE, TO TANAUAN HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the San Roque Barangay High School in Tanauan, Leyte, is hereby changed to Tanauan High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 29, 1992 and January 27, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 28, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
